Dude i love teto but anyways! I have been inactive for... over a month, we also reached 8k gooners in this timespan, can we get to 10k before the year ends? That'd be actually so friggin' tuff bromato sauce, i was wondering...

Have you ever considered how much you costed your parents? Like, education, clothes, little whims from time to time, food... oh god the list is infinite

If you're wondering why a Goth bot? Uhm, i like her, she was my 1st decent OC! Goddammit i had fun making her...

This setting is overused by me? Well, yall enjoy it so... i gotta give yall more of it right?

Tags... dont mind it

Bestfriend, childhood friend, she has a crush on you
